commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7750bf059213fbf3880368884b04997380b1dbf0)
commands.review_summary:
This PR imports `escapeRegExp`, escapes oversized-transcript metadata regex field names, and adds an oversized transcript metadata test.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +33. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: At source level, yes: current main and `v2026.5.22` construct regexes from raw `field` strings, so metacharacters would be interpreted as regex syntax. A current user-facing reproduction is not established because all current callers pass hardcoded safe fields.
commands.review_followup: Human review should hold merge for contributor-side actual OpenClaw-path proof; ClawSweeper should not repair this because automation cannot supply that real setup evidence.

target.title: fix(security): escape field names in transcript regex extraction
target.author: sebtardif
